writer: A.E.W. Mason, Michael Schiffer, Hossein Amini
actors: Heath Ledger, Wes Bentley, Kate Hudson
plot: Harry Feversham is a British Army officer. When his regiment is sent to fight in the Sudan, he resigns his commission. His three closest friends and fellow officers view him as a coward and each send him a white feather, a symbol of cowardice. His fiancée has the same view and does the same. Humiliated by this, Feversham sets off to the Sudan to redeem his honour.
